title: [Q] Does Streaming XLSX Writer support addImage()?
author: tinhktc

comments.author: beiding110
comments.body: Same problem. It still cannot works, any update or fix?

comments.author: imingyu
comments.body:
@tinhktc @beiding110 
I used AI to enable Excel JS to support streaming I/O and add images. You can refer to this answer:  https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/issues/322#issuecomment-3026225724
